title: Grocery Store Simulator
description:
In Grocery Store Simulator you take on the role of a grocery store manager. It's a first-person game where you handle every aspect of running a grocery business. From working the checkout to managing stock in the warehouse, each choice you make affects your store’s success. Play by yourself or with friends in online co-op mode to expand your store and improve your management skills.

• Place your store equipment anywhere you want, check out customer items, make sure your pricing is right, and keep shelves stocked to keep customers happy. 

• Team up with your friends online in a 4 player co-op mode to run your store together, sharing tasks and strategies to boost profits.

• Order new products, manage deliveries, and keep your warehouse organized to efficiently use the limited space and meet the daily needs of your store. 

• Personalize your store with any wallpaper you choose and give it a unique and memorable name. You can also decorate your store however you want!
description_short: Grocery Store Simulator — это кооперативная игра для 1–4 игроков, в которой вы управляете собственным супермаркетом: наполняйте полки, устанавливайте цены, нанимайте персонал, оформляйте магазин и развивайте бизнес, удерживая клиентов довольными.
